name: Surplus-72 | Service Synth
description:
{SEU Version} {Read Tags!}

Item: Surplus-72; (1) Service Synth

Description: Intact Service Droid from District 7. Rift Pull failure, Operating system defunct/non-operation.

Price: ░░░

It has been a year since the Convergence. With the stabilization of rifts a couple months prior, humanity has been able to get various non-biological technology from other civilizations. One of the many technologies that have been given to us have been Synths, anthropomorphic robot lizards that are mechanical workers. With completely customizable AI and the ability to change out their personality, build, or even limbs, allowing versatile use.

Questions of morality have come into play as well. From various incidents, it seems that the Synths may actually be sentient, and changing their personalities and 'AI' just dampen and change their conscious. There haven't been enough evidence to prove this, however.

1f8a37f8

You were always a person to appreciate the finer things in life, that being browsing government surplus sites for interesting knick-knacks. One day, you came across Surplus-72. Despite being non-operational, it would be quite the interesting conversation starter. So, you bought it. When you finally got it, it turned out it's OS was a lot more operational than what the description made it out to be...
